message:
refactor(core): add join!/select!/task::spawn_blocking to runtime_compat, migrate consumers

Add three new runtime_compat primitives:
- task::spawn_blocking: returns JoinHandle for abort/select! usage
- join! macro: re-export of tokio::join for concurrent futures
- select! macro: re-export of tokio::select for multiplexing

Migrate 10 callsites across 7 files:
- search_bridge.rs: spawn_blocking + select! (2 production sites)
- snapshot_engine.rs: spawn_blocking + select! (3 cfg-gated sites)
- storage.rs: spawn_blocking + join! (2 sites)
- tui/query.rs: join! (1 production site)
- perf_integration_tests.rs: join! (1 test site)
- socket_throughput.rs: join! + spawn (4 bench sites)

12 new tests for the added primitives (167 total in runtime_compat).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
